creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Port was updated as of r350163 (different patch committed).  Some notes about 
your submission: PORTREVISION=0 line should be dropped from Makefile; package 
file list (pkg-plist) doesn't contain new headers of version 0.24.  Next time, 
please test your changes more thoroughly before submitting them to us, thanks.
